'''Resta Shug Hai''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[X'Ting]] from [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]] who was the last living member of her clan and also a terrorist group known as [[Desert Wind]], which opposed the [[Five Families of Cestus Cybernetics|Five Families]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. As a [[Farmer/Legends|farmer]], she and her husband worked the land near [[Kibo Lake]]. After her husband died trying to gain extra money while working in the mines around [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], she eagerly joined [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Kit Fisto/Legends|Kit Fisto's]] resistance movement. When the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] [[Jangotat]] was brought to her for healing, she assisted him until he had recovered. As Jangotat went out to destroy the Five Families, she pleaded with him to let her come along, but he refused, citing that she needed to preserve her clan's culture.
